2276080.name: Star Rangers
2276080.description:
Star Rangers is an isometric space RPG where every journey beyond the inhabited systems could be your last.

The game takes place in the distant future, when humanity has already mastered interstellar travel. You arrive in a remote star system on the edge of the galaxy, where civilization is barely holding on after a devastating war.

The fleet has not yet been rebuilt, communication is unstable, and resource extraction zones have been taken over by unknown forces.

You control a ship, explore dangerous sectors of space, and make decisions that affect the survival of people in this system.

In the game, you will:

⚔️ Fight space pirates and other threats

🔬 Explore and discover new technologies

🚀 Search for and rescue survivors

👩‍🚀 Develop the skills of the captain and crew members

Star Rangers is a story about survival, exploration, and people who go where others dare not.
